attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
BK_QUOTE_NUM  AS BK_QUOTE_NUM ,
TRIM(COALESCE(cast(LINE_NUMBER as varchar(50)),'-999')) AS BK_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_NUM,
TRIM(COALESCE(cast(cast(Q_LINE.PARENT_LINE_OBJECT_ID as bigint) as varchar(50)),-999)) AS BK_PARENT_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_NUM,
/*coalesce(Q_LINE.OBJECT_ID,-999) AS BK_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY        , */
SM.BK_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY   AS BK_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY      ,
COALESCE(PARENT_LINE_OBJECT_ID,-999) as PARENT_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY,
COALESCE(trim(Q_LINE.FULFILLMENT_TYPE),'-999') AS FULLFILLMENT_TYPE_CD,
-999 as SRC_REPORTED_UPLIFT_FACTOR_RT,
0 AS TOTAL_LINE_COST_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(Q_LINE.DESCRIPTION,'UNKNOWN') AS DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_DESCR,
coalesce(Q_LINE.CREATED_DATE,DATE)  AS SOURCE_CREATED_DTM,
COALESCE(Q_LINE.UPDATED_DATE,DATE) AS SOURCE_UPDATED_DTM,
COALESCE(Q_LINE.LINE_TYPE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS SOURCE_QUOTE_LINE_TYPE_CD,
CASE WHEN coalesce(Q_LINE.QUANTITY,0) >2147483647 THEN 0 ELSE coalesce(Q_LINE.QUANTITY,0) END AS EXPECTED_QTY,
--COALESCE(Q_LINE.EXT_LIST_PRICE,0) AS EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT,
CAST (COALESCE(Q_LINE.EXT_LIST_PRICE,0)*COALESCE(PL_CONVERSION_RATE,0) as decimal(26,7)) as EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(Q_LINE.EXT_LIST_PRICE_GPL,0) AS EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_GPL_USD_AM,
--COALESCE(Q_LINE.FINAL_NET_PRICE,0) AS FINAL_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT,
CAST (COALESCE(Q_LINE.FINAL_NET_PRICE,0)*COALESCE(PL_CONVERSION_RATE,0) as decimal(26,7)) as FINAL_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT,
trim(COALESCE(cast(Q_LINE.DURATION as bigint),'-999')) AS EXPECTED_DURATION_CNT,
COALESCE(Q_LINE.MLB_INDICATOR,'N') AS MLB_IND_FLG,
CASE WHEN COALESCE(Q_LINE.ACTIVE,0)=1 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS ACTIVE_FLG,
COALESCE(CREATED_BY,'UNKNOWN') AS SOURCE_CREATED_BY_USER_ID,
COALESCE(UPDATED_BY,'UNKNOWN') AS SOURCE_UPDATED_BY_USER_ID,
TRIM(COALESCE(NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,'-999')) AS BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
TRIM(COALESCE(NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID,'-999')) AS BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID,
COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY,-999) AS PRODUCT_KEY,
coalesce(Q_LINE.OBJECT_ID,-999)AS SK_QUOTE_LINE_OBJECT_ID_INT,
'UNKNOWN' AS RU_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
0 AS RU_ADJUSTMENT_USD_AMT,
--coalesce(Q_LINE.NONSTANDARD_DISC,0) AS NON_STANDARD_DISCOUNT_USD_AMT,
CAST (COALESCE(Q_LINE.NONSTANDARD_DISC,0)* EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT as decimal(26,7)) as NON_STANDARD_DISCOUNT_USD_AMT,
--coalesce(Q_LINE.PROMO_DISC,0) AS PROMITIONAL_DISCOUNT_USD_AMT,
CAST (COALESCE(Q_LINE.PROMO_DISC,0)*  EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT as decimal(26,7)) as PROMITIONAL_DISCOUNT_USD_AMT,
--coalesce(Q_LINE.TRADE_IN_DISC,0) AS TRADE_IN_DISCOUNT_USD_AMT,
CAST (COALESCE(Q_LINE.TRADE_IN_DISC,0)*COALESCE(PL_CONVERSION_RATE,0) as decimal(26,7)) as TRADE_IN_DISCOUNT_USD_AMT,
--coalesce(Q_LINE.MULTI_YEAR_DISC,0) AS MULTI_YEAR_DISCOUNT_USD_AMT,
CAST (COALESCE(Q_LINE.MULTI_YEAR_DISC,0)* EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT as decimal(26,7)) as MULTI_YEAR_DISCOUNT_USD_AMT,
--coalesce(Q_LINE.CONTRACTUAL_DISC,0) AS CONTRACTUAL_DISCOUNT_USD_AMT,
CAST (COALESCE(Q_LINE.CONTRACTUAL_DISC,0)* EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT as decimal(26,7)) as CONTRACTUAL_DISCOUNT_USD_AMT,
coalesce(trim(Q_LINE.WEB_ORDER_ID),'0') AS  WEB_ORDER_ID     ,
LTRIM(RTRIM(COALESCE(cast(cast(Q_LINE.ORDER_STATUS as bigint) as varchar(10)),'UNKNOWN'), '.') ) AS DEAL_QUOTE_LN_ORD_STATUS_CD,   
USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) ,
USER,
COALESCE(Q_LINE.WF_PRICED,'N') AS WATERFALL_PRICING_FLG     ,    
COALESCE(Q_LINE.SMT_LINE_ID_INT,-999)   AS EP_SMT_LINE_ID_INT        ,    
COALESCE(Q_LINE. SOLUTION_IDENTIFIER,'UNKNOWN')   AS SOLUTION_IDENTIFIER_CD        ,
--COALESCE(Q_LINE.NEGOTIATED_ADJUSTED_DISC,0) as NEGO_ADJSTD_DSCNT_USD_AMT ,
CAST (COALESCE(Q_LINE.NEGOTIATED_ADJUSTED_DISC,0)* EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT as decimal(26,7)) as NEGO_ADJSTD_DSCNT_USD_AMT,
CAST (COALESCE(Q_LINE.EXT_NET_PRICE_AMT_STD,0)*COALESCE(PL_CONVERSION_RATE,0) as decimal(26,7)) as EXTENDED_NET_PRICE_STD_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(Q_LINE.EXT_NET_PRICE_AMT_STD,0) as EXTD_NET_PRICE_STD_LOCAL_AMT,
CAST (CAST(COALESCE(Q_LINE.ADDITIONAL_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT,0)*COALESCE(PL_CONVERSION_RATE,0)AS DECIMAL(26,7))* EXPECTED_QTY as decimal(26,7))as ADDITIONAL_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT,
CAST(COALESCE(Q_LINE.TRADE_IN_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT_STD,0)*COALESCE(PL_CONVERSION_RATE,0) as decimal(26,7)) as TRADE_IN_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT_STD,
COALESCE(EL.LOV_SUBTYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS SOURCE_QUOTE_LINE_SUBTYPE_CD    ,
OEM_REB_FLAG,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
'=' AS DML_TYPE,
COALESCE(PROGRAM_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS PROGRAM_ID,
COALESCE(trim(AS_PROJECT_NUMBER),'UNKNOWN') AS AS_PROJECT_NUMBER,
COALESCE(ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO,'UNKNOWN') AS ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO,
coalesce(Q_LINE.NONSTANDARD_DISC,0) AS NON_STANDARD_DISCOUNT_PCT,
coalesce(Q_LINE.EFFECTIVE_DISC_STD,0) AS STANDARD_DISCOUNT_PCT,
coalesce(Q_LINE.SRC_PROGRAM_ID_INT,0) AS SRC_PROGRAM_ID_INT,
ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO_TXT,
GLOBAL_PRC_LIST_EXTEND_USD_PRC,
TOTAL_PURCHAS_ADJ_CRDT_USD_AMT,
UI_HIDE_FLG,
SOA_SUBSCRIPTION_TYPE_CD,
PRICING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
CHARGE_TYPE_NM,
INITIAL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
REMAINING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
ACTION_TAG_NM,
AUTO_RENEWAL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
BILLING_MODEL_NM,
PREPAY_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
RATE_TABLE_NM,
RATE_TABLE_URL_ADDR,
SBP_SUBSCRIPTION_ID,
SUBSCRIPTION_END_DT,
SUBSCRIPTION_START_DT,
UNIT_OF_MEASUREMENT_NM,
USAGE_QTY,
SUBSCRIPTION_CREDIT_USD_AMT,
'CCW' AS SS_CODE,
REQUESTED_START_DT,
REQUESTED_END_DT,
COALESCE(Q_LINE.MAGIC_KEY_ID,'UNKNOWN') as MAGIC_KEY_ID,
COALESCE(Q_LINE.MONTHLY_RECURRING_USD_AMT,-999.000000) as MONTHLY_RECURRING_USD_AMT,
'UKNOWN' AS INSTANCE_ID,
Q_LINE.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG,
Q_LINE.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD,
Q_LINE.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME,
Q_LINE.AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT,
Q_LINE.AI_PRODUCT_STRAT_CLASS_NM,
Q_LINE.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID
FROM 
(
SELECT
OBJECT_ID                     ,
PARENT_LINE_OBJECT_ID         ,
LINE_NUMBER                   ,
QUOTE_OBJECT_ID               ,
LINE_TYPE                     ,
LINE_TYPE_NAME                ,
EXT_LIST_PRICE_GPL            ,
EXT_LIST_PRICE                ,
QUANTITY                      ,
FINAL_NET_PRICE               ,
PART_NUMBER                   ,
DESCRIPTION                   ,
FULFILLMENT_TYPE              ,
DURATION                      ,
CONTRACTUAL_DISC              ,
MLB_INDICATOR                 ,
PROMO_DISC                    ,
NONSTANDARD_DISC              ,
TRADE_IN_DISC                 ,
MULTI_YEAR_DISC               ,
ACTIVE                        ,
CREATED_DATE                  ,
CREATED_BY                    ,
UPDATED_DATE                  ,
UPDATED_BY                    ,
WEB_ORDER_ID                  ,
ORDER_STATUS                  ,
WF_PRICED                     ,
SMT_LINE_ID_INT               ,
SOLUTION_IDENTIFIER           ,
EXT_NET_PRICE_AMT_STD         ,
NEGOTIATED_ADJUSTED_DISC      ,
ADDITIONAL_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT    ,
TRADE_IN_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT_STD  ,
OEM_REB_FLAG,
PROGRAM_ID,
AS_PROJECT_NUMBER,
ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO,
EFFECTIVE_DISC_STD,
SRC_PROGRAM_ID_INT,
ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO_TXT,
GLOBAL_PRC_LIST_EXTEND_USD_PRC,
TOTAL_PURCHAS_ADJ_CRDT_USD_AMT,
UI_HIDE_FLG,
SOA_SUBSCRIPTION_TYPE_CD,
PRICING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
CHARGE_TYPE_NM,
INITIAL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
REMAINING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
ACTION_TAG_NM,
AUTO_RENEWAL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
BILLING_MODEL_NM,
PREPAY_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
RATE_TABLE_NM,
RATE_TABLE_URL_ADDR,
SBP_SUBSCRIPTION_ID,
SUBSCRIPTION_END_DT,
SUBSCRIPTION_START_DT,
UNIT_OF_MEASUREMENT_NM,
USAGE_QTY,
SUBSCRIPTION_CREDIT_USD_AMT,
REQUESTED_START_DATE AS REQUESTED_START_DT,
REQUESTED_END_DATE AS REQUESTED_END_DT,
COALESCE(MAGIC_KEY,'UNKNOWN') as MAGIC_KEY_ID,
COALESCE(MONTHLY_RECURRING_COST,-999.000000) as MONTHLY_RECURRING_USD_AMT,
CASE WHEN ST.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD  IN('AI_Dedicated','AI_Capable_Intent_Yes') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END as TRANSACTION_AI_FLG,
ST.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD,
ST.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME,
ST.AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT,
ST.AI_PRODUCT_STRAT_CLASS_NM,
ST.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_INT_RAW_CQ_QUOTE_LINE_VW ST
/*UNION ALL -- COMMENTED AS PART OF CCW DATA FIX AUG REL
SELECT 
OBJECT_ID                     ,
PARENT_LINE_OBJECT_ID         ,
LINE_NUMBER                   ,
QUOTE_OBJECT_ID               ,
LINE_TYPE                     ,
LINE_TYPE_NAME                ,
EXT_LIST_PRICE_GPL            ,
EXT_LIST_PRICE                ,
QUANTITY                      ,
FINAL_NET_PRICE               ,
PART_NUMBER                   ,
DESCRIPTION                   ,
FULFILLMENT_TYPE              ,
DURATION                      ,
CONTRACTUAL_DISC              ,
MLB_INDICATOR                 ,
PROMO_DISC                    ,
NONSTANDARD_DISC              ,
TRADE_IN_DISC                 ,
MULTI_YEAR_DISC               ,
ACTIVE                        ,
CREATED_DATE                  ,
CREATED_BY                    ,
UPDATED_DATE                  ,
UPDATED_BY                    ,
WEB_ORDER_ID                  ,
ORDER_STATUS                  ,
WF_PRICED                     ,
SMT_LINE_ID_INT               ,
SOLUTION_IDENTIFIER           ,
EXT_NET_PRICE_AMT_STD         ,
NEGOTIATED_ADJUSTED_DISC      ,
ADDITIONAL_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT    ,
TRADE_IN_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT_STD  ,
OEM_REB_FLAG,
PROGRAM_ID,
AS_PROJECT_NUMBER,
ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO,
EFFECTIVE_DISC_STD,
SRC_PROGRAM_ID_INT,
ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO_TXT,
GLOBAL_PRC_LIST_EXTEND_USD_PRC,
TOTAL_PURCHAS_ADJ_CRDT_USD_AMT,
UI_HIDE_FLG,
SOA_SUBSCRIPTION_TYPE_CD,
PRICING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
CHARGE_TYPE_NM,
INITIAL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
REMAINING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
ACTION_TAG_NM,
AUTO_RENEWAL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
BILLING_MODEL_NM,
PREPAY_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
RATE_TABLE_NM,
RATE_TABLE_URL_ADDR,
SBP_SUBSCRIPTION_ID,
SUBSCRIPTION_END_DT,
SUBSCRIPTION_START_DT,
UNIT_OF_MEASUREMENT_NM,
USAGE_QTY,
SUBSCRIPTION_CREDIT_USD_AMT,
REQUESTED_START_DATE AS REQUESTED_START_DT,
REQUESTED_END_DATE AS REQUESTED_END_DT,
COALESCE(MAGIC_KEY,'UNKNOWN') as MAGIC_KEY_ID,
COALESCE(MONTHLY_RECURRING_COST,-999.000000) as MONTHLY_RECURRING_USD_AMT,
CASE WHEN AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD  IN('AI_Dedicated','AI_Capable_Intent_Yes') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N'  END as TRANSACTION_AI_FLG,
EX.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD,
EX.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME,
EX.AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT,
EX.AI_PRODUCT_STRAT_CLASS_NM
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_INT_RAW_CQ_QUOTE_LINE_VW EX*/ )Q_LINE
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_QUOTE NDQ
ON NDQ.SK_QUOTE_OBJECT_ID_INT = Q_LINE.QUOTE_OBJECT_ID
AND NDQ.SS_CODE <> 'CCWR'
LEFT JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NDAILY
ON NDAILY.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = NDQ.FROM_CURRENCY_CD AND 
NDAILY.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE = NDQ.TO_CURRENCY_CD AND
NDAILY.BK_CONVERSION_DATE = NDQ.CONVERSION_DT 
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID = Q_LINE.PART_NUMBER
LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CQ_LOV EL
ON Q_LINE.LINE_TYPE=EL.LOV_INDEX
AND EL.LOV_TYPE='BOM_LINE_TYPE'
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE SM
ON SM.SK_OBJECT_ID_INT = Q_LINE.OBJECT_ID
AND SM.SS_CODE <> 'CCWR'

SELECT 
OBJECT_ID, 
PARENT_LINE_OBJECT_ID,
LINE_NUMBER, 
QUOTE_OBJECT_ID, 
LINE_TYPE, 
LINE_TYPE_NAME, 
EXT_LIST_PRICE_GPL, 
EXT_LIST_PRICE, 
QUANTITY, 
FINAL_NET_PRICE, 
PART_NUMBER, 
DESCRIPTION, 
FULFILLMENT_TYPE, 
DURATION, 
CONTRACTUAL_DISC, 
MLB_INDICATOR, 
PROMO_DISC, 
NONSTANDARD_DISC, 
TRADE_IN_DISC, MULTI_YEAR_DISC, 
ACTIVE, 
CREATED_DATE, 
CREATED_BY, 
UPDATED_DATE, 
UPDATED_BY, 
WEB_ORDER_ID, 
ORDER_STATUS, 
WF_PRICED, 
SMT_LINE_ID_INT, 
SOLUTION_IDENTIFIER, 
EXT_NET_PRICE_AMT_STD, 
NEGOTIATED_ADJUSTED_DISC, 
ADDITIONAL_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT, 
TRADE_IN_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT_STD, 
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE ,
OEM_REB_FLAG,
PROGRAM_ID,
AS_PROJECT_NUMBER,
ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO,
EFFECTIVE_DISC_STD,
coalesce(SRC_PROGRAM_ID_INT,0) AS SRC_PROGRAM_ID_INT,
ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO_TXT,
GLOBAL_PRC_LIST_EXTEND_USD_PRC,
TOTAL_PURCHAS_ADJ_CRDT_USD_AMT,
UI_HIDE_FLG,
SOA_SUBSCRIPTION_TYPE_CD,
PRICING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
CHARGE_TYPE_NM,
INITIAL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
REMAINING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
ACTION_TAG_NM,
AUTO_RENEWAL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
BILLING_MODEL_NM,
PREPAY_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
RATE_TABLE_NM,
RATE_TABLE_URL_ADDR,
SBP_SUBSCRIPTION_ID,
SUBSCRIPTION_END_DT,
SUBSCRIPTION_START_DT,
UNIT_OF_MEASUREMENT_NM,
USAGE_QTY,
SUBSCRIPTION_CREDIT_USD_AMT,
REQUESTED_START_DATE,
REQUESTED_END_DATE,
MAGIC_KEY,
MONTHLY_RECURRING_COST,
AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD,
TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME,
AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT,
AI_PRODUCT_STRAT_CLASS_NM,
SUSBSCRIPTION_REF_ID
FROM $$STGDB.ST_INT_RAW_CQ_QUOTE_LINE_VW Q_LINE
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_QUOTE NDQ WHERE  NDQ.SK_QUOTE_OBJECT_ID_INT = Q_LINE.QUOTE_OBJECT_ID )

SELECT
TRIM(Q_LINE.QUOTE_ID) AS BK_QUOTE_NUM,--
COALESCE(TRIM(Q_LINE.LINE_NUMBER),-999) AS BK_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_NUM,
CAST(COALESCE(TRIM(Q_LINE.PARENT_LINE_OBJECT_ID),-999)AS BIGINT) AS BK_PARENT_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_NUM,
coalesce(TRIM(Q_LINE.OBJECT_ID),-999) AS BK_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY        ,
COALESCE(TRIM(PARENT_LINE_OBJECT_ID),-999) as PARENT_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY,
'UNKNOWN' AS FULLFILLMENT_TYPE_CD,
-999 as SRC_REPORTED_UPLIFT_FACTOR_RT,
0 AS TOTAL_LINE_COST_USD_AMT,
'UNKNOWN' AS DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_DESCR,
coalesce(Q_LINE.CREATED_ON,DATE)  AS SOURCE_CREATED_DTM,--
COALESCE(Q_LINE.UPDATED_ON,DATE) AS SOURCE_UPDATED_DTM,--
'UNKNOWN' AS SOURCE_QUOTE_LINE_TYPE_CD,
CASE WHEN coalesce(Q_LINE.QUANTITY,0) >2147483647 THEN 0 ELSE coalesce(Q_LINE.QUANTITY,0) END AS EXPECTED_QTY,
--CAST (COALESCE(Q_LINE.EXT_LIST_PRICE,0)/*COALESCE(PL_CONVERSION_RATE,0)*/ as decimal(26,7)) as EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT,
CAST (COALESCE(Q_LINE.EXT_LIST_PRICE,0)*COALESCE(NDAILY.PL_CONVERSION_RATE,0) as decimal(26,7)) as EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT,---new
COALESCE(Q_LINE.EXT_LIST_PRICE,0) AS EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_GPL_USD_AM,
--0 As FINAL_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT,
CAST (COALESCE(Q_LINE.FINAL_NET_PRICE,0)*COALESCE(NDAILY.PL_CONVERSION_RATE,0) as decimal(26,7)) as FINAL_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT, --new
COALESCE(Q_LINE.DURATION,'999') AS EXPECTED_DURATION_CNT,
'N' AS MLB_IND_FLG,
'Y' AS ACTIVE_FLG,
/*
COALESCE(Q_LINE.CREATED_BY,'UNKNOWN') AS SOURCE_CREATED_BY_USER_ID,--
COALESCE(Q_LINE.UPDATED_BY,'UNKNOWN') AS SOURCE_UPDATED_BY_USER_ID,--
NVL(Q_LINE.CREATED_BY,'UNKNOWN') AS SOURCE_CREATED_BY_USER_ID,--
NVL(Q_LINE.UPDATED_BY,'UNKNOWN') AS SOURCE_UPDATED_BY_USER_ID,--
COALESCE(NULLIF(Q_LINE.CREATED_BY,'NULL'),'UNKNOWN') SOURCE_CREATED_BY_USER_ID,
COALESCE(NULLIF(Q_LINE.UPDATED_BY,'NULL'),'UNKNOWN') SOURCE_UPDATED_BY_USER_ID,
*/
COALESCE(OREPLACE(Q_LINE.UPDATED_BY,'',NULL),'UNKNOWN') SOURCE_CREATED_BY_USER_ID,
COALESCE(OREPLACE(Q_LINE.UPDATED_BY,'',NULL),'UNKNOWN') SOURCE_UPDATED_BY_USER_ID,
COALESCE(TRIM(NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID),-999) AS BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
COALESCE(TRIM(NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID),-999) AS BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID,
COALESCE(TRIM(NP.ITEM_KEY),-999) AS PRODUCT_KEY, --pp
coalesce(TRIM(Q_LINE.OBJECT_ID),-999)AS SK_QUOTE_LINE_OBJECT_ID_INT,
'UNKNOWN' AS RU_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
0 AS RU_ADJUSTMENT_USD_AMT,
CAST (COALESCE(Q_LINE.NON_STANDARD_DISC,0)* EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT as decimal(26,7)) as NON_STANDARD_DISCOUNT_USD_AMT,--
0 AS PROMITIONAL_DISCOUNT_USD_AMT, 
--CAST (COALESCE(Q_LINE.TRADE_IN_DISC,0)*COALESCE(PL_CONVERSION_RATE,0) as decimal(26,7)) as TRADE_IN_DISCOUNT_USD_AMT,--dev
0 AS  TRADE_IN_DISCOUNT_USD_AMT, 
0 As MULTI_YEAR_DISCOUNT_USD_AMT, 
0 As CONTRACTUAL_DISCOUNT_USD_AMT, 
'UNKNOWN'  As WEB_ORDER_ID,
'UNKNOWN' As  DEAL_QUOTE_LN_ORD_STATUS_CD, 
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
'N' AS WATERFALL_PRICING_FLG , 
-999   AS EP_SMT_LINE_ID_INT,    
'UNKNOWN'   AS SOLUTION_IDENTIFIER_CD ,
-999 AS NEGO_ADJSTD_DSCNT_USD_AMT,
--CAST (COALESCE(Q_LINE.EXT_NET_PRICE_AMT_STD,0)*COALESCE(PL_CONVERSION_RATE,0) as decimal(26,7)) as EXTD_NET_PRICE_STD_USD_AMT, --new
-999 AS EXTD_NET_PRICE_STD_USD_AMT,
-999 AS EXTD_NET_PRICE_STD_LOCAL_AMT,
--CAST (CAST(COALESCE(Q_LINE.ADDITIONAL_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT,0)*COALESCE(PL_CONVERSION_RATE,0)AS DECIMAL(26,7))* EXPECTED_QTY as decimal(26,7))as ADDTNL_CREDIT_USD_AMT, --new
-999 AS ADDTNL_CREDIT_USD_AMT,
--CAST(COALESCE(Q_LINE.TRADE_IN_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT_STD,0)*COALESCE(PL_CONVERSION_RATE,0) as decimal(26,7)) as TRADE_IN_UNIT_CREDIT_USD_AMT, --new
-999 AS TRADE_IN_UNIT_CREDIT_USD_AMT,
'UNKNOWN' AS SOURCE_QUOTE_LINE_SUBTYPE_CD, 
'=' AS OEM_REBATE_FLG,
'UNKNOWN' AS BK_AS_PROJECT_CD,
'UNKNOWN' AS SERVICE_PROGRAM_DESCR, 
'UNKNOWN' AS ADDTNL_INFO_CMNT,
coalesce(Q_LINE.NON_STANDARD_DISC,0) AS NON_STANDARD_DISCOUNT_PCT,
0 AS STANDARD_DISCOUNT_PCT,
-999 AS SRC_PROGRAM_ID_INT,--pp
COALESCE(Q_LINE.ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO,'UNKNOWN') AS ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO_TXT,
-999 AS GLOBAL_PRC_LIST_EXTEND_USD_PRC,
-999 AS TOTAL_PURCHAS_ADJ_CRDT_USD_AMT,
'N' AS UI_HIDE_FLG,
'UNKNOWN' AS SOA_SUBSCRIPTION_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(Q_LINE.PRICING_TERM,-999) as PRICING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,--
'UNKNOWN' AS CHARGE_TYPE_NM,
-999 AS INITIAL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
-999 AS REMAINING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
'UNKNOWN' AS ACTION_TAG_NM,
-999 AS AUTO_RENEWAL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
'UNKNOWN' AS BILLING_MODEL_NM,
-999 AS PREPAY_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
'UNKNOWN' AS RATE_TABLE_NM,
'UNKNOWN' AS RATE_TABLE_URL_ADDR,
'UNKNOWN' AS SBP_SUBSCRIPTION_ID,
COALESCE(CAST(Q_LINE.SUBSCRIPTION_END_DATE AS VARCHAR(10)),'3500-01-01') AS SUBSCRIPTION_END_DT,--
COALESCE(CAST(Q_LINE.SUBSCRIPTION_START_DATE AS VARCHAR(10)),'3500-01-01') AS SUBSCRIPTION_START_DT,--
/*
Q_LINE.SUBSCRIPTION_END_DATE AS SUBSCRIPTION_END_DT,--
Q_LINE.SUBSCRIPTION_START_DATE AS SUBSCRIPTION_START_DT,--
*/
CASE WHEN TRIM(Q_LINE.UNIT_OF_MEASUREMENT)='' THEN 'UNKNOWN' 
     WHEN Q_LINE.UNIT_OF_MEASUREMENT IS NULL  THEN 'UNKNOWN'
	 ELSE
	 Q_LINE.UNIT_OF_MEASUREMENT END AS UNIT_OF_MEASUREMENT_NM,
Q_LINE.QUANTITY AS USAGE_QTY,
/*
--COALESCE(Q_LINE.QUANTITY,-999) AS USAGE_QTY,--
--COALESCE(OREPLACE(CAST(Q_LINE.QUANTITY AS VARCHAR(10)),'',NULL),-999) AS USAGE_QTY,
*/
-999 AS SUBSCRIPTION_CREDIT_USD_AMT,
--'N'AS NOAH_ELIGIBLE_FLG,
-- -999 AS XAAS_COM_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY,
'REVCLOUD' AS SS_CODE,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
'=' AS DML_TYPE,
cast ('1900-01-01' as DATE format 'YY/MM/DD') AS REQUESTED_START_DT,
cast ('3500-01-01' as DATE format 'YY/MM/DD') AS REQUESTED_END_DT,
'UNKNOWN' AS MAGIC_KEY_ID,
-999.000000 AS MONTHLY_RECURRING_USD_AMT,
'N' as TRANSACTION_AI_FLG,
'UNKNOWN' AS AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD,
'UNKNOWN' AS TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME,
1.000000 as AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT,
'UNKNOWN' AS PRODUCT_STRATEGY_VALUE,
'UNKNOWN' AS SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID
FROM $$STGDB.ST_REVCLOUD_QUOTE_LINES Q_LINE

INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_QUOTE NDQ
ON NDQ.SK_QUOTE_OBJECT_ID_INT= cast(Q_LINE.QUOTE_ID AS DECIMAL(18,0))

LEFT JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NDAILY
ON NDAILY.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = NDQ.FROM_CURRENCY_CD AND 
NDAILY.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE =NDQ.TO_CURRENCY_CD AND
NDAILY.BK_CONVERSION_DATE=NDQ.CONVERSION_DT 

LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON TRIM(NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID) = TRIM(Q_LINE.PART_NUMBER)

/*---existing ccw join
INNER JOIN SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_QUOTE NDQ
ON NDQ.SK_QUOTE_OBJECT_ID_INT = Q_LINE.QUOTE_OBJECT_ID
LEFT JOIN  FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NDAILY
ON NDAILY.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = NDQ.FROM_CURRENCY_CD AND 
NDAILY.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE =NDQ.TO_CURRENCY_CD AND
NDAILY.BK_CONVERSION_DATE=NDQ.CONVERSION_DT;
*/

SELECT 
ST.ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO,
ST.BILLING_MODEL,
ST.CHARGE_TYPE,
ST.CREATED_BY,
ST.CREATED_ON,
ST.DURATION,
ST.EXT_LIST_PRICE,
ST.FINAL_DISCOUNT,
ST.FINAL_NET_PRICE,
ST.QUOTE_ID,
ST.LINE_TYPE,
ST.NON_STANDARD_DISC,
ST.OBJECT_ID,
ST.OFFER_TYPE,
ST.PART_NUMBER,
ST.PREPAY_TERM,
ST.PRICING_TERM,
ST.QUANTITY,
ST.SUBSCRIPTION_END_DATE,
ST.SUBSCRIPTION_START_DATE,
ST.UNIT_LIST_PRICE,
ST.UNIT_NET_PRICE,
ST.UNIT_OF_MEASUREMENT,
ST.UPDATED_BY,
ST.UPDATED_ON,
ST.PARENT_LINE_OBJECT_ID,
ST.EDW_CREATE_DTM,
ST.LINE_NUMBER,
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE,
'UNKNOWN' AS AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD,
'UNKNOWN' AS TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME,
1.000000 AS AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT,
'UNKNOWN' AS AI_PRODUCT_STRAT_CLASS_NM
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_REVCLOUD_QUOTE_LINES ST
LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_QUOTE NDQ
ON NDQ.SK_QUOTE_OBJECT_ID_INT= CAST(ST.QUOTE_ID AS DECIMAL(18,0))

LEFT JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NDAILY
ON NDAILY.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = NDQ.FROM_CURRENCY_CD AND 
NDAILY.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE =NDQ.TO_CURRENCY_CD AND
NDAILY.BK_CONVERSION_DATE=NDQ.CONVERSION_DT 

LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON TRIM(NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID) = TRIM(ST.PART_NUMBER)
WHERE 
NDQ.SK_QUOTE_OBJECT_ID_INT IS NULL
OR 
NDAILY.PL_CONVERSION_RATE IS NULL
OR
NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID IS NULL
